title: sneaker horses
description: replaces horse armor with sneakers (not the item's icon though)
body:
this resource pack replaces horse armor with some boots. it could be good if you think the horse armor looks ugly on horses or you just want drip instead of armor


got a problem with this resource pack or got suggestions for some others ones? dm me on discord, my username is pepsimann4722 


if you want to modify this and publish it please give me credit
